name: XCEL ENERGY INC
business: Xcel Energy is a major U.S. regulated electric and natural gas delivery company serving customers in eight states through four utility subsidiaries. It provides a comprehensive portfolio of energy-related products and services to approximately 3.9 million electric customers and 2.2 million natural gas customers.

exposures.sentence: Xcel Energy provides a comprehensive portfolio of energy-related products and services to approximately 3.9 million electric customers and 2.2 million natural gas customers through four utility subsidiaries.

In our base 2026 - 2030 capital investment plan, we have ~9,500 MW of new and repowered wind, solar, and battery storage resources included and ~3,000 MW of new natural gas generation to ensure reliability.
Xcel Energy has two nuclear plants with approximately 1,700 MW of total 2025 net summer dependable capacity that safely and reliably generates carbon free electricity for the NSP System.
New demand remains robust in our territories as we fuel the rapid growth from AI and data centers, industrial electrification and electric vehicle adoption.

In our base 2026 - 2030 capital investment plan, we have ~9,500 MW of new and repowered wind, solar, and battery storage resources included and ~3,000 MW of new natural gas generation to ensure reliability.
Xcel Energy owns approximately 115,000 conductor miles of transmission lines across its service territory.
By 2035, Xcel Energy aims to enable the charging infrastructure for 1.5 million electric vehicles across the areas we serve.
A cybersecurity incident or security breach could have a material effect on our business.

catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we completed the second phase of our Sherco Solar project in Minnesota, with a third phase coming online in 2026, making it the largest solar facility in the upper Midwest.

catalysts.event: Sherco Solar Phase 4 proposed capacity target
catalysts.sentence: We are also proposing to add a fourth phase, which would bring the facility's total generating capacity to 910 MW by 2029, providing enough clean energy to power 190,000 homes across the upper Midwest.

catalysts.event: CPUC decision on 2025 Colorado electric rate case
catalysts.sentence: A CPUC decision and implementation of final rates is anticipated in the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: MPUC decision on 2025 Minnesota natural gas rate case
catalysts.sentence: An MPUC decision is expected in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: NMPRC decision on SPS New Mexico electric rate case
catalysts.sentence: A NMPRC decision and implementation of final rates is anticipated in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Google data center electric service agreement executed
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, NSP-Minnesota entered into an electric service agreement to power a new Google data center in Minnesota.
